title: Gateway: XML CoT to compact CoT compression
description: Parse incoming CoT XML from ATAK, compress to compact binary for mesh transmission. Extract lat/lon/alt/course/speed/team/role from XML structure. Software-only: pure parsing/encoding.
close_reason: Implemented compress_cot_xml() gateway with XML parsing, binary encoding, and full roundtrip. 59 tests, >15x compression.
